title: Site Manager (Day/Night)
description:
Responsibilities

· Planning and Scheduling

  • Plan and schedule the works on site with internal and external stakeholders, ensuring that works are efficiently and effectively executed.
  • Prepare the necessary site schedules and programmes with various stakeholders and advise project scheduler of changes, implications and improvements.
  • Plan site utilization and utilities as required.

· Site Supervision and Coordination

  • Conduct and minute daily coordination meeting with site personnel, subcontractors and suppliers to plan daily and forward-looking activities.
  • Manage and oversee daily operations on site.
  • Coordinate with the necessary stakeholders.

· Safety Compliances

  • Review, comment and approve on Method of Statements/Procedures (MOPs, MOSs), Health Risk Assessments (HRAs) and Safe Work Procedures (SWPs).
  • Ensure Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) standards and requirements are complied with on site.
  • Serve as Lifting Engineer for site to ensure safe and proper lifting by subcontractors.

· Quality Controls

  • Ensure compliance to quality standards alongside project Quality Control (QA/QC) personnel.
  • Oversee expeditious clearance of non-compliances raised by Authorities, Client, Qualified Persons or their representatives.

· Resource Management

  • Monitor and manage site resources including Direct Manpower, materials and equipment.
  • Appropriate resources according to site needs while minimizing wastage.

· Documentation and Reporting

  • Maintain proper site documentation with Site Supervisor including but not limited to daily reports, site instructions, variation orders, etc.
  • Provide Quantity Surveyor with the necessary documentation for claims or where items have time and cost implication.

Requirements

  • Degree/Diploma with at least 7 years of experience in project / engineering / construction management, preferably in data centre or critical environment.
  • Experience in Microsoft Office (Microsoft Word, Excel and PowerPoint).
  • Certification in workplace safety (eg. WSQ, WSH) preferred.
  • Positive proactive attitude and ethical behaviour.
  • Good leadership and team player with ability to work independently and resolve challenges in a fast-paced environment.
  • Excellent interpersonal, communication, collaborative and people management skills.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Microsoft Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

postedCompany.description: Acme Associates Pte Ltd (ACME) offers Critical Infrastructure Lifecycle Solutions (CILS) for critical infrastructure like Data Centers, providing one-stop solution that includes Audit & Feasibility studies, Design & Build, Project Management and after sale support.
postedCompany.name: ACME ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.
